title: Hoarding Support Groups - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Mental & Behavioral Health > Hoarding Support Groups 1 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CLUTTERERS ANONYMOUS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides an international, nonprofessional, self-supporting 12-Step fellowship where members share experience, strength, and hope to address clutter-related challenges. Use the locator tool on the website to find local meetings. Confidential Mailing Address Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Meeting times vary by location. Daily telephone meetings and peer support calls are available. Email (866) 402-6685 Visit Website More Details No Mapping Information Available
